title: Screen capture via tab share and SaaS file delete fix
description:
Support screen capture now uses the browser’s tab share API first (then crops your selection), so portal color-mix CSS no longer blocks screenshots. SaaS tenant owners and portal-permission accounts can delete files again — customer account types were incorrectly wiping portalDelete and related roles.

Who is affected: support chat screen capture on all hosts; SaaS PipeShare file delete.
changeLog: Screen capture prefers native tab share, then crops the selected region.
html2canvas fallback inlines resolved colors and drops color-mix stylesheets.
SaaS owners / portal-permission users keep portal delete (and upload/edit) capabilities.
Customer account types no longer zero out explicit portal* role flags.
